title: hieracium heterogynum subsp. heterogynum
intro: Hieracium heterogynum subsp. heterogynum, also known as Hawkweed, is a plant species within the dandelion-like family of Hieracium, characterized by its yellow flowers and bitter taste. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium heterogynum subsp. heterogynum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tea, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support liver and kidney function.
